title: Implement A2A Read-Aloud Skill
description: Once read-aloud is refactored into a library, implement a new 'read_aloud' skill in the A2A server. This skill should accept multi-modal input, stream status updates via TaskStatusUpdateEvents, and return the final MP3 as an A2A Artifact.

title: Expand A2A exposure to existing services
Add 'watch' or 'resume' mode to CLI for existing tasks
Fix Task ID persistence on exit and rebuild client
Handle completed tasks gracefully in resume command
Support TaskID continuation in CLI
description: Add a --task flag to the 'invoke' command. When provided, the client should set the taskId field in the outgoing Message to enable session continuity.

title: Implement Auth-gated skills and server interceptors
Implement Cobra CLI with describe/invoke commands
Implement Bubble Tea TUI for CLI Client
Review and Polish A2A Blog Post
description: Read through the drafted blog post, check for clarity, and prepare for publication.

title: Implement AI Researcher skill with Task updates and Artifacts
description: Add an 'ai_researcher' skill that uses Gemini to generate a multi-step research report. It must demonstrate A2A Tasks by sending status updates (Working...) and delivering the final result as a structured DataPart Artifact.

title: Add flag to save Artifacts to directory
Implement Gemini-based Intent Detector for Skill Dispatching
description: Replace the manual string matching in the server with a Gemini-powered router. It should use the AgentCard's skill descriptions to decide which SkillID to invoke based on user input.

title: Draft A2A and Interactions API blog post
description: Synthesize project learnings into a blog post titled 'My intro to A2A and the Interactions API - patterns for long running agents'. Include code snippets, diagrams, and pattern explainers.

title: Research and implement Go library for Gemini Interactions API
description: Create a Go client library for the Gemini Interactions REST API based on the documentation in docs/interactions_api.md. Use GEMINI_API_KEY for authentication.

title: Implement A2A-to-Gemini Session Mapping
description: Store the Gemini InteractionID in the A2A Task metadata. On subsequent requests for the same TaskID, retrieve this ID to provide context to the Interactions API.

title: Integrate Vertex AI Gemini into hello_world skill
description: Integrate Gemini into the hello_world skill using the new Go GenAI SDK ('google.golang.org/genai') with a Vertex AI backend. Support .env for config (GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT, GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION, GEMINI_MODEL) and replace the static greeting with a dynamic Gemini prompt.

title: Implement 'summarize' skill with Artifact reference support
description: Add a 'summarize' skill. It should summarize either the direct input text or, if a TaskID is referenced, find and summarize the most recent Research Artifact from that task.

title: Implement Hybrid HTTP/A2A server architecture
Replace ai_researcher with Interactions API implementation
description: Refactor the 'ai_researcher' skill to use the new Interactions API library for long-running research tasks, leveraging the Deep Research Agent if applicable.

title: Add hint when artifact is truncated in CLI output
Update CLI client to handle A2A Artifacts
description: Enhance the Cobra CLI to detect and display Artifacts returned in A2A Task responses, including support for DataPart (JSON) and FilePart visualizations.

title: Implement stateful 'chat' skill using Interactions API
description: Add a 'chat' skill that leverages the Interactions API for session continuity. This will allow for general conversation that can access the history of any Task ID.
